content.query:
DROP TABLE [OUT].[MEDALLIA_HRC_EXP_INVITE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [OUT].[MEDALLIA_HRC_EXP_INVITE]
( 
	[CALL_ID] [int]  NULL,
	[CALL_DATETIME] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CALL_TYPE] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[AGENT_ID] [int]  NULL,
	[CUSTOMER_ID] [int]  NULL,
	[FIRST_NAME] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[LAST_NAME] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[EMAIL_ADDRESS] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[PHONE_NUMBER] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[CALL_DISPO] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[AGENT_EMAIL] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[SALES_ORGANIZATION] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[AGENT_DISPLAY_NAME] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[COUNTRY] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[JOURNEY_SEGMENT] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[LANGUAGE] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[BRAND_NAME] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[CONTACT_METHOD] [nvarchar](max)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	HEAP
)
GO
